# vox-perf-audit

Append-only durable store for [Vox](https://github.com/misty-step/vox) perf audit artifacts.

## Structure

```
audit/
  <commit-sha>.json          # Master push artifacts (provider lane)
  pr/
    <pr-number>/
      <commit-sha>.json           # PR run (provider lane, if keys present)
      <commit-sha>-codepath.json  # PR run (deterministic codepath lane)
```

## Retention

Never rewrite. Only append. Artifacts are permanent.

## Generated by

[`misty-step/vox`](https://github.com/misty-step/vox) — `.github/workflows/perf-audit.yml` (master push) and `.github/workflows/perf-audit-persist.yml` (PR runs).

See [docs/performance/README.md](https://github.com/misty-step/vox/blob/master/docs/performance/README.md) for the full perf audit workflow.
